description_long: This is a high-top sneaker featuring a bold and dynamic design with a navy blue base, black overlays, and striking yellow laces. The side panels are adorned with a stylized lightning bolt graphic in white and gold, adding a sense of motion and energy. The shoe has visible white stitching along the toe box and side panels, contributing to its urban and sporty aesthetic. The midsole is white with a textured pattern, while the outsole appears to be made of durable rubber. The interior is padded for comfort, and the collar is reinforced for ankle support. Branding elements are present on the tongue and heel, enhancing its streetwear appeal.
description: A high-top sneaker with a navy blue base, yellow laces, and bold lightning bolt graphics in white and gold on the sides. Features black overlays, white stitching, and a white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view shows the navy blue toe box, yellow criss-cross laces, and black tongue with a visible logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the white and gold lightning bolt graphic, black overlays, and white midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black heel counter, white stitching, and a logo on the heel tab.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the same lightning bolt graphic and color scheme.
attribute_logo: white geometric logo on tongue and small emblem on heel tab
